task_completion.description: The photograph is opened in an image editing application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows an image editing application (like GIMP) open with a photograph loaded. The initial image will look somewhat flat or desaturated.

task_completion.description: An automatic color enhancement tool is selected.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the agent navigating the application menus to select an automatic color enhancement tool (e.g., in GIMP: Colors -> Auto -> Color Enhance).

task_completion.description: The photograph visibly shows improved color distribution and vibrancy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the photograph in the canvas with visibly richer colors, higher saturation, and better contrast compared to the initial state.

task_completion.description: The export dialog is configured with the correct file path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows an 'Export Image' dialog with the file name 'enhanced_photo.png' and the destination folder set to '/home/ga/Documents'.
Screenshot shows the agent clicking the final 'Export' button, or an export progress bar, indicating the file is being saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the GUI of an image editor to enhance the image.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the graphical user interface of an image editor (e.g., GIMP) rather than using terminal commands (like ImageMagick) to process the image.

integrity.description: The enhancement is applied through the software's built-in tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The enhancement is applied via the application's menus/dialogs rather than running a script or downloading a pre-enhanced image.

integrity.description: The file is exported using the application's GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file is exported using the application's GUI export dialog, not by moving or copying files via the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The original image is a flat/underexposed photograph (saturation -50, contrast -30). The agent is expected to use GIMP's 'Colors -> Auto -> Color Enhance' filter to improve the saturation and color distribution. The final image should visibly appear more vibrant and colorful. The result must be exported to /home/ga/Documents/enhanced_photo.png.
